description:
ICICI Lombard Health Insurance introduced a new rider called the ‘ BeFit Rider ‘ .
The BeFit Rider covers 3 main aspects ;
1. Cashless OutPatient Services
2. Rewards
3. Well Being of the Policy Holder.

In this video , we will discuss BeFit’s features, benefits , plan options , reward points distribution & premium charged .

IMPORTANT : ICICI Lombards’ BeFit Plan can only be bought along with a base plan & not as a separate product.

To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/

Do SUBSCRIBE to our Youtube Channel for more such informative videos.

ICICI Lombard Complete Health Insurance Policy : https://youtu.be/PMpzgLl1ksg
